transcript: I'm a medical assistant at Legacy Health and I'm excited to show you what a day in my life is like. Let's go! I leave for work around 7 15 a.m. Since I get to wear scrubs to work it makes getting dressed really easy. I usually drive to work but some people take public transportation. I became an MA shortly after high school. The training program took only eight months and I love being able to help people and make a contribution.
